article_title: pgvector + .NET 实战：用 PostgreSQL 做向量搜索
core_theme: pgvector 是 PostgreSQL 扩展，不需要专用向量数据库即可实现语义搜索，在 .NET 中结合 Aspire + Dapper + MEAI 完成端到端教程
reader_takeaway: 读完后能在现有 PostgreSQL 项目里启用 pgvector，生成 embedding 并用余弦距离做语义搜索
summary_angle: 已有 PostgreSQL？只需 CREATE EXTENSION vector，就能做语义搜索——不用再部署专用向量库

information_blocks.source_anchor: Not every AI feature needs a dedicated vector database. If your data already lives in PostgreSQL, you don't need another moving part.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：Pinecone/Qdrant 等专用向量库（复杂）；右侧：pgvector 扩展在 PostgreSQL 里（简洁）

information_blocks.source_anchor: embedding vector(1024) defines a vector column with 1024 dimensions, matching the qwen3-embedding:0.6b model output
information_blocks.visual_idea: 数据库表结构示意，含 vector(1024) 列，以及 HNSW 索引标记

information_blocks.source_anchor: The <=> operator is pgvector's cosine distance function, where lower values mean more similar.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 查询向量 ↔ 数据库向量，<=> 操作符连接两者，输出距离分数

main_metaphor: 数据库柱体中生长出向量射线，表示 PostgreSQL 原生支持向量搜索
primary_subject: 一个 PostgreSQL 数据库实体，内含向量数据和搜索射线
subject_action: 数据库接收查询向量并射出相似度结果
composition: 左右对照（无向量库 vs pgvector），中间过渡焦点为数据库主体
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 随机从 40 项风格池中选中，游戏原画风的清晰视觉层次和制作精良的光影感适合技术教程封面
style_safety_note: 「游戏原画风」不强指向任何特定品牌、工作室或艺术家，使用通用描述词，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 验证主焦点（pgvector 数据库主体）和左右对照（专用库 vs 扩展）叙事弧线是否清晰
revision_targets: 如果左右对照不清楚，优先强化两侧对比
如果向量射线视觉太抽象，改为箭头+编号贴片
final_prompt:
Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail. Editorial technical illustration style.

Scene: A PostgreSQL database object as the central hero — a glowing cylindrical database tower with blue-teal vector ray beams emanating outward in a radial pattern. Left side shows a cluttered multi-database cluster (representing Pinecone/Qdrant/Weaviate) with complex connecting wires, labeled with a small Chinese chip '无需专用库'. Right side shows clean simplicity — the single pgvector-enhanced PostgreSQL tower. In the center foreground, a vector query arrow labeled '余弦距离' connects to a table schema with a highlighted row labeled '向量列 1024'. The background is a deep blue-navy gradient. A small callout chip near the database column reads '1024'. No fake terminal output, no dashboard, no fabricated metrics. Polished game-art lighting with amber highlights. Wide horizontal composition.

Allow visible text: up to 3 Chinese short labels ('无需专用库', '向量列', '余弦距离') and number '1024'. No English slogans, no watermarks, no hero title text.
